title: Lazy Corn Melt
description: A rich, crumbly Chinese dish featuring cornstarch that's perfect for lazy Sundays when you're short on time.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine cornstarch and melted butter. Add vanilla extract and sugar.
Add eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
Gradually add flour while continuing to mix until just combined. Do not overmix.
Pour batter into an 8x8 inch baking dish lined with parchment paper or sprayed with cooking spray.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and puffy on top.
Enjoy your Lazy Corn Melt as a decadent dessert.
